text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Creek, I have heard from others that today is
your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I may be so bold as to ask, what sort of thing
are you interested in? I would like to present a
proper gift, as thanks for everything you've done.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, Yaeno! You don't need to be so formal with
me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but thank you. It's more than enough to
know that you care.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No! Feelings alone cannot possibly suffice.
Please, at least choose from one of these.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If by land, a bear. If by water, a shark... I would
offer something of great strength, though it's a
mere fraction of what I owe.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my... You're so strong, Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I think bears and sharks would be awfully
startled if they saw you coming.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So... how about this? Let's make bear and shark
candies to put on top of a cake. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll teach you how to make them, so you can make
my present all by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must craft candies... U-understood. If that is
your wish, I shall do it—no matter the hardship!
